MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Keith Reyan of OIUM REYEN & PRYOR (415-392-8300), appearing for defendant / moving party Honeywell International, Inc.
Lance R. Stewart of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Robert Culver, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Honeywell International Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication is denied as untimely. Defendant failed to provide proper notice pursuant to C.C.P. sections 437c(a) and 1010.6, CRC 2.251 and G.O. 158, which applies pursuant to the asbestos Case Management Order. Defendant's proof of service shows that defendant electronically served its motion on August 24, 2012. G.O. 158 explicitly states that the filing and service provisions of C.C.P. section 1010.6 shall apply. With a noticed hearing date of November 8, 2012, defendant failed to provide proper notice by failing to extend the notice period by two court days as required by C.C.P. 1010.6. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Cathy Meyer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 11596 (503/TLJ)
